title: The Graduation Gig: Let's Celebrate!
description: Join Coco 'n' the Fellas at The Prince of Greenwich to celebrate the graduation of three band members with a night of brand new swing compositions.
descriptionEn: Join Coco 'n' the Fellas at The Prince of Greenwich to celebrate the graduation of three band members with a night of brand new swing compositions.
descriptionBg: Присъединете се към Coco 'n' the Fellas в The Prince of Greenwich, за да отпразнуваме дипломирането на трима от членовете на групата с вечер на нови суинг композиции.
body:
After a beeing in Italy for a week and doing a Live recording album gig we are going to be celebrating the Graduation of 3 of our band members! 

Soooo we have booked out the jazz room upstairs for a partyyyyyyyy!!! And the best part is! The Entry is FREE!!!

Come and celebrate wish us and hear some of our brand new compositions! It will be swinginnnnnnn......
bodyEn:
After a week in Italy and our live album recording, we're celebrating the graduation of three band members! We've booked the upstairs jazz room at The Prince of Greenwich for a big party. 

Join us to celebrate and hear some of our brand new compositions. It's going to be swinging! Free entry for everyone.
bodyBg:
След една седмица в Италия и записа на нашия албум на живо, празнуваме дипломирането на трима от членовете на групата! Резервирахме джаз залата на горния етаж в The Prince of Greenwich за голямо парти.

Елате да празнуваме заедно и да чуете някои от най-новите ни композиции. Ще бъде истински суинг! Вход свободен за всички.
